query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'petpooja_webhook_orders' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
